LLM

Anthropic Claude 4 推出革命性记忆架构

Anthropic's Claude 4 Introduces Revolutionary Memory Architecture

T
TechCrunch
· 2026年3月5日 · 1 分钟阅读
摘要

Claude 4 具备突破性的持久记忆系统，可在数月长的对话和项目中保持上下文。

Anthropic has launched Claude 4, featuring what the company calls 'the first truly persistent AI memory architecture.' Unlike previous models that lose context between sessions, Claude 4 maintains detailed understanding of ongoing projects, personal preferences, and complex workflows across extended time periods.

The new memory system allows Claude to recall specific details from conversations that occurred months ago, understand evolving project requirements, and build upon previous work without requiring users to re-explain context. This represents a fundamental shift from stateless AI interactions to truly personalized AI assistance.

Early enterprise users report transformative changes in how they collaborate with AI. Legal teams can maintain ongoing case research, product managers can track long-term roadmap evolution, and researchers can build cumulative knowledge bases. Claude 4 is available now through Anthropic's API and consumer applications.
